message:
feat(dashboard): add REST API endpoints for VM actions

Add handleAPIVM handler with endpoints for:
- POST /api/vm/{id}/stop - stop a running VM
- DELETE /api/vm/{id} - destroy a VM
- POST /api/vm/{id}/snapshots - create a snapshot
- POST /api/vm/{id}/snapshots/{name}/restore - restore from snapshot (placeholder)

All endpoints return HTMX-compatible headers for seamless UI integration.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
